Package org.eventb.core.tests

Class ProjectBuildTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
org.eventb.core.tests.EventBTest
org.eventb.core.tests.ProjectBuildTests
public class ProjectBuildTests extends EventBTest
Tests exercising build on whole projects.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static void
    assertBuildFailsNoTempFile(IEventBRoot root, String tmpFileName)
    Verifies that, the project being read-only, the build fails with a tool problem but that the given temporary file is not present afterwards.

    void
    testContextSCTmpFile()
    Ensures that the static checker temporary file gets deleted when the static checker ends in error on a context.
    void
    testMachinePOTmpFile()
    Ensures that the proof obligation generator temporary file gets deleted when the static checker ends in error.
    void
    testMachineSCTmpFile()
    Ensures that the static checker temporary file gets deleted when the static checker ends in error on a machine.
    void
    testMultipleConfigurations()
    Test ensuring that several configurations can be given within a file, and that the SC and POG work appropriately as soon as one configuration is present.
    void
    testTwoConcrete()
    Regression test for builder bug: Two components depend on a third one, but PO are generated only for one of them.

      private static void assertBuildFailsNoTempFile(IEventBRoot root, String tmpFileName) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Verifies that, the project being read-only, the build fails with a tool problem but that the given temporary file is not present afterwards.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testTwoConcrete

      public void testTwoConcrete() throws Exception
      Regression test for builder bug: Two components depend on a third one, but PO are generated only for one of them.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testMultipleConfigurations

      public void testMultipleConfigurations() throws Exception
      Test ensuring that several configurations can be given within a file, and that the SC and POG work appropriately as soon as one configuration is present.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testContextSCTmpFile

      public void testContextSCTmpFile() throws Exception
      Ensures that the static checker temporary file gets deleted when the static checker ends in error on a context. The error is caused by the output file being read-only.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testMachineSCTmpFile

      public void testMachineSCTmpFile() throws Exception
      Ensures that the static checker temporary file gets deleted when the static checker ends in error on a machine. The error is caused by the output file being read-only.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testMachinePOTmpFile

      public void testMachinePOTmpFile() throws Exception
      Ensures that the proof obligation generator temporary file gets deleted when the static checker ends in error. The error is caused by the output file being read-only.
      Throws:
      Exception
